markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Check-in on the Phase 1 sprint and review progress.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Phase 1 is on track.** Cresta is satisfied with GrowthX's responsiveness and quality, though content still requires PMM-level nuance for perfection.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [**Publishing is unblocked.** 10 articles will go live this week, providing the data signals needed to accelerate calibration and scale.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Early AI visibility is strong.** A comparison article is already being cited by Gemini and Google AI Overviews, a key win for high-intent, low-volume topics.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [**Cresta is streamlining its review process.** Devon will delegate reviews to eliminate himself as a bottleneck and speed up publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

## Topics

### Phase 1 Check-in & Feedback

  - [Tyler (GrowthX AE) joined to ensure a smooth transition to Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Cresta's feedback was positive:](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [**Responsiveness:** GrowthX is quick to address feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [**Quality:** Output is good and improving.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [**Nuance:** Articles still require PMM-level adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [**Russell's View:** The project is "solid territory, not exceptional." He wants faster progress, but acknowledges holiday delays.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [**GrowthX's View:** This calibration is normal for Phase 1. The goal is to drive traffic first, then refine voice.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Publishing & Workflow Updates

  - [**Publishing:** 10 articles will go live this week (7 reviewed, 3 pending).](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [**Images:** Stock images will be used for this batch; AI-generated images will be replaced later.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [**Review Process:** Devon is delegating reviews to eliminate himself as a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
      - [**New Workflow:** Nicky (editorial) + PMM (subject matter).](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [**New Artifacts:**](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
      - [**Statistics Doc:** Live and integrated into the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
      - [**Case Studies Doc:** In development; will be added to the pipeline to include one example per draft.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)

### AI Visibility & Performance Tracking

  - [Aida presented early AI visibility data from the Scrunch dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [**Key Win:** The "Decagon vs. Sierra" article is being cited by Gemini and Google AI Overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [**Significance:** This proves the content is comprehensive enough for LLMs, a major win for high-intent, low-volume topics.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Definitions:**](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [**Presence:** Cresta's name appears in an LLM response.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [**Citation:** A link to Cresta's website is included.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [**Risk:** LLMs can misinterpret content. Devon proposed a review cycle to flag and correct any "funky" outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [**Access:** Cresta cannot access Scrunch directly. GrowthX will provide weekly data exports.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [Publish 10 articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [Deliver 5 new article drafts by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Provide weekly AI visibility data exports.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [Pin the Looker Dashboard link to the Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [**Cresta:**](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [Review the 3 pending articles today.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the new statistics artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
      - [Test Looker Dashboard access using the correct email.](https://fathom.video/share/ohNcurMtaH1EHhqC-TMUyFWaQEy-wstB?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
